entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
Hi Andre, 

 

thanks a lot for this great Blog. I generated a Proxy in our DEV System which worked great, however now I am wondering how I can transport it to QA. By default the proxy seems to be in service group /IWBEP/ALL however this is only for DEV and QA as per documentation: Service Registration (sap.com). Do i need to create a new service group for the service and if so how do I register the proxy as a service in that group? Or is there another way to go about this?

 

Best Regards,

Niklas

entry.title: S&OP - creation of product groups.
entry.content:
Hi,

S&OP - creation of product groups. 

All the materials are created with one material type Zxxx => no products with mat type PROD exist.

In MMNR via F5 I see no interval assigned to PROD.

Does it mean that I cannot use/create product groups in MC84 / at all if the materials are not of the mat type PROD? 

I cannot create a material via mm01 with the the type PROD.

Is there any possibility to create products groups for customized material types Zxxx?

best regards,

Walter

entry.title: Re: Safety Data Sheet Customization and Generation
entry.content: @Shush971 Thanks for the question, sorry for the delayed answer I was away from work. As @christoph_bergemann wrote, this is for public cloud only right now.

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Visual Inspection Process in SAP Digital Manufacturing

Hi @OmerFaruk,

Can you try clearing your browser cache and trying again?
If that does not work - please create a ticket via official channels.

Thanks,
Pavlo

entry.title: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
I want to transfer Unrestricted-Use Stock from GS01 to Blocked Stock at GS02. When using the following field values, I received the error message:"Deficit of SL Stck.in qual.insp 1 PC : MPD241204BK24 GS00 GS01"
Here is my post body

{
    "PostingDate": "2024-09-05T00:00:00",
    "GoodsMovementCode": "04",  // Transfer Posting
    "to_MaterialDocumentItem": [
        {
            "Plant": "GS00",
            "StorageLocation": "GS01",
            "InventoryStockType": "01",
            "Material": "MPD241204BK24",
            "GoodsMovementType": "321",
            "QuantityInEntryUnit": "1",
            "IssuingOrReceivingPlant": "GS00",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStorageLoc": "GS02",
            "IssuingOrReceivingStockType": "03"
        }
    ]
}
How should I adjust the field values?

entry.title: Re: How to include a URL to access the SAP WF approval sc...
entry.content: No, I mean you should open a support ticket -> https://launchpad.support.sap.com/ component is BC-BMT-WFM We have colleagues working in support. But they need a ticket.

entry.title: Approval of documents Based on Sales Employee
entry.content:
Dear Team

We are using SAP B1 Version 10 Hana.

We have 7 buyers in company, our Data entry clerks are entering data in SAP.

So we require approval template in a way, that approval will be like below.

Originator >> Buyer >> CEO

Where:

Buyers are multiple

CEO is only one.

Please support to fix approval template as per our requirements.

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Enterprise Organizational Management in S/4HANA Service
entry.content:
Hi Andres,
I am sorry to say but there is no tool nor simple instruction note to migrate from CS to S/4HANA Service. This is really a project of its own.
There are some features in S/4HANA Service that make the migration from CS to S/4HANA Service easier. Most notably the feature "Service with Advanced Execution" (see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c9b5e9de6e674fb99fff88d72c352291/51cfa721e37542a5b082cdb86ce5556f.html?locale=en-US) that allows to re-use many of the CS concepts in S/4HANA Service as well, including e.g. Task Lists, procurement integration, resource related billing, ...
There is also an older blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/new-maintenance-service-process-in-sap-s-4hana-2022/ba-p/13557797 that introduces the topic based on the S/4HANA 2022 release. There were many additional capabilities shipped with release S/4HANA 2023, see e.g. https://me.sap.com/notes/3330419 

Kind regards, Oliver

entry.title: Re: Error During ChangeSet Offline Call
entry.content:
@bill_froelich 

Item actually do not have any link to Head.

 

<EntityType Name="Item" m:HasStream="true" sap:content-version="1">
 <Key>
  <PropertyRef Name="OrderS"/>
  <PropertyRef Name="Posnr"/>
 </Key>
 <Property Name="Discount" Type="Edm.Decimal" Nullable="false" Precision="3" Scale="1" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cliente" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="OrderS" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Doc. commerc." sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Posnr" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="6" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Posizione" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Matnr" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="40" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Materiale" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="EAN" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="18" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cd. EAN/UPC" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="CustMaterial" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="35" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Mat. cliente" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="ShipTo" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cliente" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Qty" Type="Edm.Decimal" Nullable="false" Precision="13" Scale="13" sap:unicode="false" sap:unit="UM" sap:label="Qtà prevista" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="UM" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="3" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Unità mis. base" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false" sap:semantics="unit-of-measure"/>
 <Property Name="DataCons" Type="Edm.DateTime" Precision="0" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Data" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Tester" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="1" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Casella di spunta" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Value" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="500" sap:unicode="false" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Url" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="500" sap:unicode="false" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Storage" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Magazzino" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="TypePos" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Cat. pos." sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false"/>
 <Property Name="Plant" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Divisione" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
 <Property Name="DescriptionMat" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="40" sap:unicode="false" sap:label="Descrizione" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:sortable="false" sap:filterable="false"/>
</EntityType>

<EntitySet Name="ItemSet" EntityType="ZXXXXXSRV.Item" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:deletable="false" sap:pageable="false" sap:addressable="false" sap:content-version="1"/>

entry.title: Re: How to include a URL to access the SAP WF approval sc...
entry.content: you did the customizing in maintenance view SWP_URL_CONFIG_V? There you can also check your settings with a workitem ID.

entry.title: Re: Custom code analysis for SAP S/4HANA with SAP Fiori App Custom Code Migration
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja,

Thank you very much for the helpful information.
I hope to get some support from you as I have a specific problem with the “Scope status”.
The Custom Code Migration App is installed on premise on a S/4HANA 2023 SP01 FP 02/2024 system.

I have loaded SUSG data from an ERP EHP8 production system into the development system.
Now I would like to check “FUNCTIONAL_DB” via ATC due to the upcoming “Suite on HANA” migration. So far so good.

A “Custom Code Analysis” project has been created.
Usage data from the development system has been added.
Results are available after the check.

But I do not receive any “Scoped Objects”. I started the analysis again, but that didn't produce any results yesterday either.
Any idea what the problem could be?

entry.title: Re: Questions about the Payment Advice
entry.content:
Hello GordonH
We can download the payment notice only in PDF format.
I want to download it in another format such as CSV.
Thank you.

entry.title: read field with namespace segment xpath cloud integration
entry.content:
hi,

I need to read the value of the field "message2" from a segment, with Cloud Integration.

this is the body:

<message1 xmlns="test_message1">

<message2>test_odv<message2>

</message1>

I tried //message2 but not working probably for the xmlns.

Does anyone know what the formula is to read the "message2" field?

entry.title: Host a CodeJam in Berlin
entry.content:
Hello,

after our first successful CodeJam session in June in Berlin, we would like to organize and host another CodeJam. The desired topic is

Combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Applications

The period would be the end of October or the beginning of December 2024 I would be happy if it were possible to organize another joint CodeJam.

Kind regards

Robby

Naor

If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact signavio_success@sap.com.

Best regards,

Veronika

entry.title: Re: MRSS V2000 Level 0006 on S/HANA - BAPI_ABSENCE_GETDETAILEDLIST obsolete
entry.content: BAPI_EMPATTABS_GETLIST + BAPI BAPI_PTMGRATTABS_MNGDELETE are the replacements. closed.

entry.title: Re: Deploying Cap service on newer btp trial account
entry.content: my instance is start i create new space in cloud foundry and map with my instance but still getting the same above error

entry.title: Possibilities for /SCWM/RFUI transaction using the slipstream engine with Edge?
entry.content:
Hi dear experts,

We are currently using the EWM_MOBGUI to enter the /SCWM/RFUI transaction (which we have enhanced using SAP Screen Personas) using an edge Browser. We know that edge should not be our first choice but we are very limited in our designe due to hardware constraints. 

With this current architecture we are facing the following problems:

1. The cursor is always visible although the user uses the touch screen of the device.

2. We cannot use the windows keyboard because it would enable the user to escape our webapplication/the maximised edge browser and display far more malicious behavior. But the user needs a vitual keyboard on the Log-In screen because there is no scanner or external hardware.

I have been searching the internet and especially the SAP community and there are some indications that the Slipstream Engine might be able to solve or at least avoid this problems. Am I correct with this analysis? Are there any other possibilities we should investigate to solve those problems.

Thank you very much for you suggestions and support and best regards,

Sven

entry.title: Re: Unmanaged Application, custom actions. enable/disable...
entry.content:
I have the requirment to enable disable a button at item level in Objet Page based on the status of Header and items. Code is given below for your reference..

READ ENTITIES OF zc_ewm_stock_header IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY item
FIELDS ( status ) WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT DATA(result_i)
ENTITY item BY \_header
FIELDS ( status ) WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT DATA(result_h)
FAILED failed.

IF failed IS INITIAL.

result = VALUE #( FOR <fs_i> IN result_i
                              LET statusval_h = COND #( WHEN line_exists( result_h[ status = '01' ] )
                                                                           AND ( <fs_i>-status = 'W' OR
                                                                                      <fs_i>-status = 'E4' )
                                                                          THEN if_abap_behv=>fc-o-enabled
                                                                           ELSE if_abap_behv=>fc-o-disabled )
                             IN ( %features-%action-stck_sync = statusval_h
                                    %tky = <fs_i>-%tky
                                    requestid = <fs_i>-requestid
                                    sequencenumber = <fs_i>-sequencenumber
                                    currentcount = <fs_i>-currentcount ) ).

ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content:
Hi @Wenny 

You were asking for the results you can see in Transfer Stock - In-Plant, that's why I thought the stock information displayed here would be important for you.

I see, you also have another question raised in the community here: Transfer Stock - In-Plant - SAP Community

My colleague has already answered and provided you the API and Communication Arrangement.

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: Re: Unmanaged Application, custom actions. enable/disable...
entry.content:
Also in behavior definition add below logic.

action ( features: instance ) stck_sync result [1] $self;
Also don't forget to add it in projection behavior definition.

use action stck_sync;

entry.title: Re: How to consume S/4HANA Cloud API using ABAP program from the same S/4HANA Cloud system
entry.content: Hi Kaidehmann,

entry.title: Re: How to consume S/4HANA Cloud API using ABAP program from the same S/4HANA Cloud system
entry.content: Hi Kaidehmann, It doesn´t make any sense to go out with a communication arrangement to consume a service that is defined on the same instance. SAP doesn't offer any alternative to consume the business object directly from my own server? Or to invoke the CRUD operations on those objects?

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS BP
entry.content: On a side note, but relevant for CIS, pay attention to SAP SAAS, some of it allows you to choose the CIS to be used, others, not.

entry.title: Re: Data Action to swing account values
entry.content:
Hi Thandeka,

something like that:

VARIABLEMEMBER #1 OF [d/Dimension1]

// Calculate sum over other dimensions (here: Dimension1)
DATA([d/Dimension1] = #1, [/dAccount] = "OD500") = RESULTLOOKUP([/dAccount] = "OD500") 

// Check if sum is positive
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Dimension1] = #1, [/dAccount] = "OD500") > 0 THEN
// Do the swing
    DATA([d/Dimension1] = "#", [/dAccount] = "CASH500") = 
       RESULTLOOKUP([d/Dimension1] = #1, [/dAccount] = "OD500")
// Delete old value
    DELETE([/dAccount] = "OD500")
ENDIF

You also may check out this blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/advanced-formulas-how-they-work/ba-p/13519758 that explains the steps like aggregation and IF with RESULTLOOKUP.

entry.title: Re: Requirement related to PO release strategy
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP OData v4 - Object page mandatory asterisk not...
entry.content:
@Andre_Fischer maybe you can help me there. I tested it again and it is working if I set the field to mandatory in the behaviour definition. But If I'm using dynamic feature control in the behavior definition and set the field to mandatory in instance_features method it isn't working. There is no asterisk in the column. Maybe you can link me to the Fiori Elements team? I'm using SAPUI5 version 1.120.19.

Thanks for your help.

Best regards
Andreas

entry.title: Re: To stop Email notifications related to workitems
entry.content:
Hi Sanan,

Seems like your suggestion is very near to the solution. but the challenging thing is how to know and check the program name and which background job is sending mails to the users. These details already checked with basis team but they are helpless. & also checked SOST i got only dome details ---(document contents, date & time, sender - WF-Batch, receiver - to 9 users mail ID's) let me check again as per your suggestion if not possible, then we will go for final option to "deletion of the work flow items in the year of 2021 stucked items with corresponding task id and user ID.

Regards,

Govindu Uday 

8121598411

entry.title: Re: Enable Flexible Column Layout for SAP UI5 Application
Duplicate payment terms We have noticed that some incoterms are duplicate so I was wondering .
Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

As a first-generation full-time undergraduate student in Computer Science. I am deeply committed to continuous learning and personal growth. I'm writing to express my strong interest in participating in the Digital Skills Initiative. My goal is to deepen my expertise in SAP development and cloud technologies, and I see this program as a perfect fit for my aspirations. It represents an excellent opportunity to stay competitive in the fast-evolving tech landscape and to further my career. I am genuinely excited about this initiative and look forward to the possibility of contributing and growing through this experience.

Best regards,

entry.title: Reinviting a registered supplier in Ariba
entry.content:
When we reinvite a fully registered supplier the reinvite count is not updated, support have advised this is by design.

Has anyone found a way of reporting on suppliers that are fully registered and reinvited again to complete a new questionnaire?

entry.title: Re: Hello All,
entry.content: Welcome Nhu!!!!

entry.title: GL Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I have a requirement to work on which is as below:

1. Need to create a GL for transfer of debtor's hold balances through manual posting.

2. Hence this GL has to be mapped with debtor codes and posting will be done through Special Indicators only.

3. We shall tranafer hold balances of debtor's in this GL code by debiting and crediting same debtor code.

entry.title: Celebrating the Success of SAP Stammtisch Kolkata August, 2024!
entry.content:
• Celebrating the Success of SAP Stammtisch Kolkata August, 2024!

We are thrilled to share that our recent SAP Stammtisch event in Kolkata on August 31, 2024, was an incredible success! It was truly a gathering filled with enthusiasm, learning, and meaningful connections among SAP enthusiasts and professionals.

Highlights from the Event

- Engaging Sessions: Participants immersed themselves in insightful discussions on Manufacturing Processes in Pharma and Life Sciences., Adapting Al in SAP, and Field Logistics. The sessions were informative, interactive, and well-received by attendees of all levels of expertise.

- Networking Opportunities: The event provided a platform for attendees to expand their professional networks, exchange ideas, and forge new collaborations within the SAP community in Kolkata.

- Knowledge Sharing: From beginners exploring career opportunities in SAP to seasoned professionals sharing their expertise, the event fostered a culture of continuous learning and skill development.

We extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who contributed to the success of this event:

- Speakers: Thank you for sharing your expertise and insights Jaydeep Basu,Niladri Hore,Sumanta Basu

- Participants: Your active participation and enthusiasm made the event lively and impactful.

Organizing Team: Your hard work and dedication ensured a seamless experience for all attendees. @Meghdeep  @Junaidjawed03  @PradiptoSaha sandeep mukherjee

Stay connected with the SAP Inside Track Kolkata to continue enriching your SAP journey. Let's keep the momentum going and look forward to more exciting events ahead!

Thank you once again to everyone who attended and supported the SAP Stammtisch Kolkata 2024. Together, we're building a stronger, more knowledgeable SAP community in Kolkata 

SAP Community 

#sap Stammtisch 

  • SpeakersStammtisch 2024 kolkataVenue details

entry.title: Re: SAP Document Management Service: Create Internal Repository

It looks like it was a bug from SAP. They deployed a fix and now it works.

See: https://me.sap.com/cases/002075129500010004232024/discussion

entry.title: Re: HXEDownloadManager can't run on windows 10
entry.content: Today tested with sapmachine and SAPJVM, the same error still happens.

entry.title: Intermediate Level Understanding of SAP BTP Architecture
entry.content:
I am glad lots of SAPers got something from my previous blog post Beginner Level Understanding on SAP BTP Architectu... - SAP Community Today I want to move on, to emphasize how SAP BTP plays an important role in "Clean Core" strategy.

 

Why is Clean Core

One of the reasons I love Apple devices is simple. Each time I updated my device e.g. iPhone or Mac, I don't have to worry about dependencies to my settings and my applications. Just keep enough battery, upgrade and enjoy new functionalities. For enterprise, surely IT managers want to have same experience to their cloud ERP solution although we all know it is not as easy as to iPhone upgrade, as your SAP ERP systems have so many customized applications, dependencies to other systems, data here and there, etc.

Clean core is the right way to solve this problem.

Ultimate goal is, even you are SAP S/4HANA private edition customers who have customized requirements to your system, keep always "fit-to-standard" and enjoy the upgrade smoothly afterwards, as it will not affect your customized objects, whether it is closely coupled using CDS views via ABAP Cloud, or side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP. 

With an ERP clean core strategy, your organization can benefit from the latest release with minimal modifications and cloud-compliant extensions and customizations. Result is that, customer is happy as they can get recent innovations and latest features from SAP without bothering customized objects, partner is happy as they can focus on business requirements, SAP is happy as customers can get more money thanks to the benefit from innovations, and finnaly I am happy if SAP is doing great so that I don't have to worry losing my job 😀.

Just take a look the famous success customer story from HITACHI.

"We previously upgraded SAP ERP version every five years, taking about a year and a half from preparation to implementation,” says Yuri Yasuda. “However, we’re now able to perform major upgrades of SAP S/4HANA Cloud for our domestic group yearly and minor upgrades twice a year. We’ve also cut the time from preparation to switchover to around one month.” 

Full Customer Story: BTS: Hitachi High-Tech 2-Tier S/4HANA Cloud with Clean Core by BTP

 

What is Clean Core

I want to talk with six dimensions related to SAP's IT solutions offer, so that you know which SAP service or product maps to which area.

1. Business Process - This is how everything begins. Without business requirements, all IT landscapes and cost has no meaning. As greeenfield customers, it is good opportunity to start completely clean core in the beginning, analyze what detail step each business process has and make it transparent among business stakeholders as well as IT employees. SAP Signavio is the tool to help organizations understand, proactively manage and optimize their business processes to achieve the agility and transparency needed for successful change. SAP LeanIX is the enterprise architect tool to help create a continuous, reliable understanding of your IT landscape to plan technology transformation, including overview of system integrations, project roadmap plan, collaboration with business stakeholders to align target state with evolving business capabilities and processes etc. And of course with S/4HANA as the "core" here, just keep as clean i.e. fit-to-standard as possible.

2. Extensibiliy - Now you have clear mind of your business process and what customized applications are critical e.g. for your external vendors. Next step is how to develep and where to deploy them? If it is closely coupled with your ERP business process and probably you keep the application access within your own organization, then on-stack development via Restful ABAP Programming (RAP) model under ABAP Cloud Environment (ABAP Steampunk) is your choice. Don't try to alter any standard code and directly change underlying data base any more and instead use CDS View i.e. “code-to-data" manner. If it is loosely coupled, and your IT staff has Java, Javascript or Python developers and ABAP is not fully qulified for the business requirement then side-by-side development via Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model under Cloud Foundry is the right way. Leverage APIs from your ERP system and modern CI/CD or open source world, you can have lots of imaginations on your application. And all the above, is the most important and straightforward meaning of "clean core" concept. Besides, there are more and more extension solutions coming out on SAP BTP e.g. low code no code SAP Build, SAP Mobile Service, etc.

3. Integration - Almost every enterprise has more than just ERP systems as their only IT landscape, while SRM, CRM, MES, PLM, WMS, HCM, etc. is pretty common to make business run end to end. This part is quite easy to understand, no one wants point-to-point connections, old way e.g. RFC, SFTP file exchange and enterprise tries to have a central place to design, implement, and monitor all different integration flows including all kinds of event. And SAP Integration Suite is enough to handle all these requests. P.S. here you can see these systems have data and transactions but business process and approvel management can strech across all these systems so tools like SAP Signavio, BPM plays an important role.

4. Data and anlytics - we all know data is valuable and meanwhile we admit it's hard to get clean data and transform it to business value and insights. SAP HANA Cloud is a database for any workload leveraging the powerful capabilities of the SAP HANA Cloud multi-model engine from relational, document store, geospatial, graph, vector, to time series data. Imagine you want to decouple your customzied Java application from your ERP core system to some place and SAP HANA Cloud is quite suitable for this as SAP has an intact methodology CAP to develep modern e2e applicaitons. SAP Datasphere also contains embedded HANA DB while the purpose is the cloud data warehouse e.g. extract transform and load (ETL)  data so as to enrich all data projects and harmonize heterogeneous data into a business semantic model of your diverse data landscape including but not limited to SAP systems and non-SAP systems e.g. Google Big Query and Microsoft Azure data lake. With data ready, naturely the next step is to understand data in a human readable way and SAP Analytics Cloud is the BI tool which seemlessly and easily integrate with SAP Datasphere. Besides, it also includes rich planning activites on your finance, sales, transport etc. You can expect new AI capabilities into these products in near future SAP enhances Datasphere and SAC for AI-driven transformation | CIO.

5. Operation - actually this part is not just the tool itself. A leader from customer or partner who is responsible for clean core governance should also keep an eye on operation, so that from discovery to implementation to finally run business iterations there are no "unclean" activites coming out e.g. exceptions as technical debt. SAP Cloud ALM as a free offer attached to cloud offerings is a powerful tool that helps you to implement and operate intelligent cloud and hybrid business solutions. You benefit from an out-of-the-box, native cloud solution, designed as the central entry point to manage your SAP landscape with content-driven guided implementation and highly automated operations. Project management, test management, transport management, monitor and alert e.g. to SAP Integration Suite etc. are all included.

6. Business AI - I am pretty sure you are familiar with GenAI as everyone is talking about this and I believe you are trying it in your daily job such as queries, writting assistant, coding assistant, generating pictures and files, etc and imagine this is bound to your business data as embedded solution to query supply chain issues, to generate customer emails based on CRM data, generate automation artifacts and integration flows via Joule. No doubt this is the revolutionary and fast changing direction for To-B world. Besides the embedded AI capabilites into different LOB products, you still have the ability to build your own LLM AI scenario based on SAP GenAI as service on BTP e.g. right now it is not unusual to combine your own knowledge base as vectors to query against LLM. Check this SAP Discovery Center Architecture - Retrieval Augmented Generation and Generative AI on SAP BTP (cloud.sap) for more details.

 

What is the Role of SAP BTP under Clean Core 

You may notice I put numbers and colors for each above pillers and they are draftly mapped to the following diagram. Except for SAP Signavio, SAP LeanIX, Embedded AI Capabilites, RAP on ABAP Steampunk, all other services are on SAP BTP.

I didn't list everything here still, as more and more solutions are built on SAP BTP even though you didn't find it in SAP Discovery Center. E.g. Sustainability Control Tower, Multibank Connectivitiy. From the above you can see BTP is the future innovations and extensions and that's why SAP announces we want to be the #1 enterprise application and business AI company powered by the leading platform.

One more thing, if you still get confused on "extensibility" please refer to the following diagram.

The keep short, everything on SAP BTP is following "clean core" strategy as they leverage the secure tunnel to your private landscape consuming modern APIs and events. Imagine you upgraded your SAP ERP system, all you need to test as regression is just the customized APIs. Vice versa, you upgraded your Java/Node.js applications, there is no influence to your SAP ERP system. Pretty simple, right? 

OK, in reality, it doesn't look simple as during transformations there are so much to consider, not just IT systems or software services, but the determination to spend money to keep core clean, organization structure, project management, stakeholder governance, CI/CD, etc. Clean core is a journey rather an overnight change.

 

Coming back to BTP journey, smiliar to the understanding and cognizance to every other things e.g. your new iPhone device, or a game like World of Warcraft, it starts with little and finally you become an expert. Once you tried SAP Integration Suite and your business goes quite well and stable, you may perhaps want to get your procurement department employees life easy via SAP Build Process Automation so that they can delegate manual repeated tasks to robots, and finally your IT staff become familiar with any other BTP services coming out as they all have same philosophy - this is a platform to help your core clean.

BTP CSP's job is to help you with this journey.

 

Clean Core Takeaways

  • Cloud transformation is a journey, not a destination
  • Clean Core is a key quality of transformation
  • Cloud and S/4HANA transformations are not an “IT Project”
  • Business Goals are the key value driver
  • Your people are the key to realizing that value with SAP’s guidance
  • Business transformation is enabled by, and requires IT transformation
  • Skills, roles, responsibilities and organizations require change
  • Approach all implementations with a cloud mindset
  • Build empathy into the core of your culture

entry.title: Re: Celebrating the Success of SAP Stammtisch Kolkata August, 2024!
entry.content: An astonishing event it was...😊

entry.title: Re: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
Hello again @Wenny,

you should make use of the correct movement type in order to move stock from unrestricted use stock to blocked stock.

The movement type 321 you used is for transferring quality stock to unrestricted use stock. In your case you need to use movement type 344.

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: Re: Discontinued Material in BOMs
entry.content:
Incase material 1234 will forever not be in use, amend BOM by replace this material with material 5678.

Where used list for both material can be tracked in BOM changes.

entry.title: Unable to get SCROM progress
entry.content:
Hello
I want to export a simple book content with 4 simple pages to SCORM.
No matter what settings I use, I can't get a process percentage.
I get 2 options:
Or I finish the book and then I get "successfully completed"
Or I stop in the middle and get "incomplete" or nothing - without the percentage of progress.

I do the test with ScormCloud and ScormTools.net for debugging

Publish Rule:

 Stracture:

 

Settings:

I tried different settings in Progress and result Tracking,  Send successful status.
I tried also Scorm 2004

Thanks,
Faraz Maqsud.

entry.title: Item category for a release sales order with reference to a contract with milestone billing plan
entry.content:
Hello Guys

Please help me. Which item category should a release sales order have when referred to a quantitative contract with billing plan , TAO item category.

I have 3 dates in the billing plan, 01.10.2024, 01.11.2024 and 01.12.2024.

I want to use the sales order to deliver and bill the first line, for entire quantity.

Thank you

entry.title: Need Fiori App ID for Service Master
entry.content:
IN SAP GUI

We use transaction AC01 to create Service master we use transaction AC02 to change Service master we use transaction AC03 to display Service master this is not possible in Fiori Apps

please assist with  Technical or Business Catalogs in Fiori.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need Fiori App ID for Service Master
entry.content:
The service master needs to maintained in SAP GUI but not Fiori. Our focus in service procurement is on simple services (lean services) and therefore there are no apps planned for AC01, AC02, and AC03.

SAP Note 2211398 describes that MM Fiori Apps cannot be continued to work with a S/4 backend.

entry.title: Re: Cross-company stock transfer: Condition P101 in billi...
entry.content: How the billing document created ?  via VF01 or VF04 or VF06 or any BAPI ?  Normally, this sort of issues would happen in case of the data is passed via BAPI.  Having said that, did you test creating manually via VF01?  Also, did you check the Analysis tab from where you will find some clue to the issue

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload freight agreement in sap TM
entry.content:
Hello Spatraju,

There is no such thing as BAPI. there are multiple blogs here which talks about this. Please check them.

In short there are four BO objects that needs to be used for creation of freight agreements.

entry.title: Enhancement of blogpost “Creation of a flexible Headcount Time Series" to allow more flexibility
entry.content:
The solution described in the blogpost (Creation of a flexible Headcount Time Series with ... - SAP Community) received a lot of positive feedback. However, there was one shortcoming: It allows only the usage of one particular “Reporting Key Date”-configuration (e.g. annual Reporting Key Dates for the last 5 years). If there are multiple instances for the custom MDF object cust_LegalEntityReportingKeyDate maintained, e.g. one for “Month”, one for “year” and one for “quarter”, then it would be required to change the assignment of the “Reporting Key Dates” within the Foundation Object “Legal Entity” via Admin Center -> Manage Data (field ‘ReportingKeyDates’). This is inconvenient and - last but not least - typically not possible for report users due to missing permissions. Alternatively, it would be possible to define multiple custom fields in “Legal Entity” (e.g. field ‘cust_ReportingKeyDates1’ for “Month”, ‘cust_ReportingKeyDates2’ for “year” and ‘cust_ReportingKeyDates3’ for “quarter”) and to use respective filters in the report, what is, of course, also inconvenient.

With the approach described in the following it is possible to select via radiobuttons which reporting key date configuration should be used. This allows far more flexibility since the report user can simply switch between multiple 'Reporting Key Date' - configurations. 

 Figure 1 – Monthly time series of the headcount visualized with a 'Stacked Bar chart' which uses the dimension 'Reporting Key Date' (and Legal Entity as 'Trellis' and and Location as 'Color')

Figure 1 shows the selection of 3 different values called “Monthly”, “Quarterly” and “Yearly”, while “Monthly” covers 21 different reporting key dates from “July 31, 2022” until “March 31, 2024”.
Note, that “Monthly”, “Quarterly” and “Yearly” are just names. E.g. it would also be possible to define “Quarterly-2” with reporting key dates from “March 31, 2024” until “December 31, 2024”.

In the following the technical design (1) of the configuration entities, (2) of the data source and (3) of the story is described. Note that the following is an enhancement of the technical description given in the blogpost “Creation of a flexible Headcount Time Series with Stories in People Analytics”. While the previous solution is dealing with 2 custom MDF objects, the enhanced solution uses even 3 custom MDF objects.

Technical design of the configuration entities

Check the original blogpost for adding a custom field ‘cust_ReportingKeyDates’ to the MDF object “Legal Entity” (Figure 5 in the original blogpost). Following 3 steps are required for the enhanced solution:

  1. See Figure 2 (left) for the creation of a custom MDF object cust_ReportingKeyDate2: You will recognize that it has the same design as cust_ReportingKeyDate from the original blogpost. However, if you have already created cust_ReportingKeyDate previously you need to define it new, otherwise the system will complain about the association which you need to create at step 3.
  2. Creation of the new custom MDF object cust_ReportingKeyDateVariant as described in Figure 2 (middle).
  3. The creation of the custom MDF object cust_LegalEntityReportingKeyDate was already described in the original blogpost. The only step which is required here, is the creation of an additional association to cust_LegalEntityReportingKeyDate as shown in Figure 2 (right).
    Note that the first association (i.e. the one which was used in the original blogpost) can be removed if you have successfully tested the new solution.

Figure 2 – Design of the 3 custom MDF objects

Now it is possible to create the "Reporting Key Dates" via Admin Center -> Manage Data: Maintain a "Reporting Key Date Variant" which can have multiple frequencies (e.g. yearly, quarterly, monthly) as indicated in Figure 3.

Figure 3 – Maintenance of Reporting Key Date Variants with respective Reporting Key Dates at custom MDF object cust_LegalEntityReportingKeyDate

Technical design of the data source

The data source for the creation of the time series is indicated at Figure 4. Note that there is no time filter applied to “Job Information” and time filter = “Today” is applied to “Legal Entity”. Use exactly the filters which are already described in the section “Technical design of the data source” of the the original blogpost.
Figure 4 –  Query and Filter to generate the time series

Creation of the story

To get the same chart as indicated in Figure 1, create a chart of chart type “Stacked Bar/Column” with Measure “Count”, Dimension “Reporting Key Date” and usage of dimension "Legal Entity” under “Color”. It is important to apply a filter for “Employment Status” as ‘Active’, Unpaid Leave’ ‘Paid Leave’ and ‘Suspended’ so that only “Active” employees are reported (maybe other values for employment status are relevant for your reporting use case).

Finally create a filter for the "Reporting Key Date Variant", i.e. the external code of MDF object cust_ReportingKeyDateVariant in the story as indicated in Figure 5. Take care that only "Single Selection" for the filter is chosen (not "Multiple Selection").

Figure 5 –  Creation of the radiobuttons for the selection of the ReportingKeyDateVariant

Refused to frame 'https://qas-3g6g84uu.eu20.sapdas.cloud.sap/' because an ancestor violates the following Content Security Policy directive: "frame-ancestors self https://*.tools.sap https://*.sap.corp https://*.sap.corp:* https://*.ondemand.com https://*.ondemand.com:* https://*.sapsf.com https://*.sapsf.eu https://*.sapsf.cn https://*.successfactors.com https://*.successfactors.eu https://*.sapdemocloud.com https://*.cloud.sap:* https://*.cloud.sap https://*.int.sap https://*.sap.com https://*.net.sap https://*.net.sap:* https://*.sapanalytics.cloud https://*.sapbydesign.com https://*.sapbydesign.com:* https://*.for.sap https://*.enter.sap https://*.only.sap:* https://*.only.sap https://*.services.sap https://*.dev.sap https://*.myhybris.cloud https://*.fgvms.com https://*.fieldglass.net https://*.fieldglass.eu https://*.ariba.com https://sap.plateau.com https://*.concursolutions.com https://*.projectorca.cloud https://sap.sharepoint.com https://*.leanix.net https://*.signavio.com https://*.emarsys.com https://*.emarsys.net https://*.cxm-salescloud.com".

Can you assist?

entry.title: SAP LOGON PAD logged in as Chinese Language shows the customer name in ENG in XD03
entry.content:
Customer name which is maintained as maintained as international version in Chinese, when logged in Chinese language shows as English language instead of Chinese language. This is in ECC system SAP ECC 6.0 version

Same if we check this is SAP S4 system when logged in Chinese it shows is Chinese is correct.

Is there any setting which we need to check in ECC where this is maintained or needs to correct

@hartmut_koerner

entry.title: Re: Data Action to swing account values
entry.content: Hi Hartmut

entry.title: European Sustainability Reporting Standards(ESRS) Journey With SAP Sustainability Control Tower(SCT)
entry.content:
SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) is designed to support organizations in ESG (Environment, Social, and Governance) reporting journey by providing a set of pre-defined metrics aligned with the European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS).

This blog provides a broad outline of how an organization can kick-start their European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) journey using SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT) with confidence.

As part of August, 2024 release, SAP introduced "SAP Sustainability Control Tower ESRS Starter Pack" functionality with ESRS metrics.

Before we dive in, let us understand a bit about European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS) and Its purpose.

The ESRS are a set of extensive standards with regard to Environment, Social, and Governance (ESG) aspects and aim to bring more transparency, accountability, and responsibility with regard to organization`s environmental and social impact. ESRS metrics have been organized into 12 extensive standards which includes, Cross-Cutting Standards, Environmental Standards, Social Standards, and Governance Standards, i.e.

  • Cross-Cutting Standards: (S1)General Requirements and (S2)General Standards
  • Environmental Standards: (E1)Climate Change, (E2)Pollution, (E3)Water and Marine Resources, (E4)Bio-Diversity and Ecosystems, (E5)Resource Use and Circular Economy.
  • Social Standards: (S1)Own Workforce, (S2)Workers In the Value Chain, (S3)Affected Communities, (S4)Consumers and End-Users
  • Governance Standards: (G1)Business Conduct

Mini Note:

Please bear in mind that the transition of ESRS journey with SAP SCT is underway and this blog highlights on how we can manage and feed the data to generate ESRS report with regard to sustainability metrics within SAP SCT using ESRS Starter Pack.

let us dive-in...

  • Data Management and Integration:

Manage Master Data: Using his application organization can import master data from CSV files, setting it apart from SAP-Provided master data. Once we import, validate and publish, the import status becomes "Published".

for instance let us look at published data for a Business Location and Energy Carrier dimensions,

Dimension - Business Location

Dimension - Energy Carrier

 Now let us configure sustainability metrics relevant for ESRS using "Manage Metrics" app.

Sustainability Metrics

 while setting up the sustainability metrics, we have to provide assurance information. 

  • Data Sourcing:

Post metric set-up, let us upload actuals using Manage ESG Data app. At this juncture, organization has got many opportunities to bring the calculate data into SCT application. We can import data either using CSV files or Import from other SAP systems , viz: SAP Datasphere, SAP Sustainability Footprint Management, SAP EHS Management.

If you want to understand how organization can calculate and import GHG emissions, dive into my latest SAP EHS-Environment Management and Sustainability Control Tower blogs, they will give a broad outline of GHG emissions calculation procedure and Import strategy to be considered to import GHG emissions into Sustainability Control Tower. My blogs as follows:

  • EHS - Environment Management, Emission Management Part-1 
  • EHS - Environment Management, Emission Management Part-2 
  • EHS - Environment Management, Emission Management Part-3 
  • Import GHG Emissions from SAP EHS - Environment Management 

In this blog, I have considered below mentioned measures to demonstrate ESRS report generation from SAP Sustainability Control Tower (SCT).

Measures

 Import Actuals:

Import Targets:

if we activate metrics for performance management, post actuals and targets import, we can view the performance of the sustainability metric.

Sustainability Metric Performance

 

  • Reporting and Analyses:

To feed the data into the report, let us navigate to ESRS Starter Pack report tile on the SAP Sustainability Control Tower launchpad.

ESRS Reporting

 

On the tab "Process Management", all the relevant activities are displayed that must be performed to get the results for all ESRS metrics and to analyze in detailed view.

For results calculation, run the activity  to read data from SCT source and calculate metrics. Now we can leverage the above shown dedicated views to access the result to report out in a table format using preconfigured layouts. We can also leverage the given options to pivot data and drill down into more details to gain additional insights. Let us access the results for our sustainability metrics by selecting option "View All Results",

then navigate to the "show data" screen,

let us use the column section to select the characteristic fields and key figure to filter the showed data.

Drill down to the ESRS standard

let us have a glance at overview tab and generate ESRS report for 2023 year.

Assign year 2023 to the report

Then system generates the ESRS Disclosures for the reporting year 2023.

ESRS Disclosures for the reporting year 2023

Now, let us spend some time to look into greater insights of ESRS Disclosures from the above report,

let us drilldown further on Climate Action aspects: Using general section of the side bar menu, input the desired values with regard to reporting year and business location, etc.

like this we can drilldown further to view the results of each ESRS standards. Now let us look at graphical representation of one of the ESRS standards.

This brings me to the end of my process walk-through. If you would like to keep up on SAP Sustainability Control Tower updates, follow me on SAP Community and LinkedIn. I hope this blog proves useful to Sustainability and Environmental Management team.

--

Yours Sincerely,

Pardhasaradhi Reddy.C

entry.title: Re: Data Action to swing account values
entry.content:
Hi @Thandeka 

Although I don't know your Account dimension structure, you can get your expected result on the below Account dimension & Advanced Formulas script.

Account Dimension

Source Data

Advanced Formulas Script

 

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Amount"
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "202409"
MEMBERSET [d/Entity] = "US"

VARIABLEMEMBER #Total_Overdraft OF [d/Account]

IF [d/Account] = BASEMEMBER([d/Account].[h/parentId], "OVERDRAFT") THEN
	DATA([d/Account] = #Total_Overdraft) = RESULTLOOKUP()
	IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = #Total_Overdraft) > 0 THEN
		IF RESULTLOOKUP() > 0 THEN
			DATA([d/Account] = [d/Account].[p/CashAcc]) = RESULTLOOKUP()
			DELETE()
		ENDIF
	ENDIF
ENDIF

 

Calculated Result

 

❗ To increase script flexibility, I am adding the Mapping property for Overdraft Member.  

I hope this helps you and let me know if I misunderstand your calculation logic.

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP - Create of grandchild is not working/reacting
entry.content:
Hi @PaulRintisch,

What does the Page Map look like? Ideally, it should have four tiers:

  1. List report
  2. Object Page for the root entity
  3. Object Page for the child entity
  4. Object Page for the grand child entity

entry.title: Re: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
Thank you Marius again!

So, I cannot directly specify which stock type to transfer from and to another stock type? Where can I find the complete list of Goods Movement Types and their corresponding use cases?

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP - Create of grandchild is not working/reacting
entry.content:
Hi!

Strangely, I can´t add the Topic (child of the root entity) as a new tier.

If I add the fourth tier manually in the manifest, it appears on the page map with the following warning: 

"Navigation target is not defined"

entry.title: SAP Reserved Characters for Business Place ODN Prefix - India
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

I have a question whether when defining the ODN prefix for the purpose of GST for Business places - India.

The Config in question is : 101319-Assign Number Ranges to Business Places for GST for India.

I have created the Business Places as per the states and wanted to give the prefix for the ODN as per the state codes such as the below;

 

Business Place - RJ (Rajasthan) 

then, it gives me an error as such;

If it was a reserved character, then it shouldn't have let me give it for the business place itself.

 

Is there any workaround or solution for the above do let me know. If we can give any relevant prefix for the ODN as i also tried the numeric state code for Rajasthan(08) and it gave me the same error.

 

 

Thanks,

Bhavesh

entry.title: Re: OUT NOW: SAP Signavio May 2024 release
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to ask you about TDD licenses of Process Transformation Manager - I don't see it neither in "Manage My Services" as option for purchase nor in partner TDD pricelist - will this be added in the near future? It isn't also available for testing in PDE (Partner Demo Environment). 

It seems like very useful new product in Signavio family but without above mentioned possibilities (DEMO or TDD for performing PoC at our customers) very difficult to sell.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

My name is Eman Kassem from Egypt I'm an ambitious woman working in IT sector having experience of around 6 years as a SAP consultant, I am trying to be professional Consultant that gain experience from work, self study and certificates to grow my career in this direction, I'm very passionate to be well known a professional SAP FICO Consultant in my market place. I'm already learning from SAP Learning Platform. I would like to go deeper in SAP learning with certification preparation.

I'm following under below categories:

- Women
- People looking to switch their careers mid-life

At the end I would like to thank SAP team for this great initiative to contribute in the growth of others.

Regards Eman.

entry.title: Re: Host Alias in SAP Integration Suite Trial
entry.content:
Hi,

Experienced the same issue. This option is not available in the trial version, but it is available in the regular one. You can proceed the course without problems, just ignore it.

entry.title: Re: I can not find /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV in my system.
entry.content: Hello @gregorw sorry I did not understand what do you mean and what should I do exactly?

entry.title: Re: Celebrating the Success of SAP Stammtisch Kolkata August, 2024!
entry.content: Thanks a lot Meghdeep for all your efforts in organizing this event.

entry.title: Re: Error During ChangeSet Offline Call
entry.content:
@bill_froelich 

Update:

after the deactivation of Media property(in SEGW) in the Entity Item I'm able to use CreateEntity action.

Seems like that when an Entity is configured to transfer a Stream you cannot use CreateEntity but you can only use a createMedia.

I do not know if this is a standard OData behavior but it seems to be the case.

entry.title: Quick Start: Build a GenAI Apps on SAP BTP in Minutes with GenAI Starter Kit!
entry.content:
The future of enterprise applications is here, and it’s powered by Generative AI (GenAI). Imagine being able to create sophisticated, AI-driven apps that can generate content, automate processes, and provide intelligent insights—all in just a matter of minutes. This isn’t a distant possibility; it’s a reality you can achieve today with SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP).

 

We’re excited to invite you on September 17, to a dynamic live stream where our experts Rui Nogueira, Vice President - Intelligent Enterprise & BTP Foundation at SAP, Evgenii Skrebtcov, Architect at SAP BTP AI Team, and Peter Conrad, Chief Development Architect at SAP will walk you through exactly how to kickstart your journey in building GenAI-powered apps on SAP BTP. Whether you’re an experienced developer or just getting started with AI, this session is designed to provide you with the tools and knowledge you need to create impactful applications quickly and efficiently.

Why This Live Stream Is a Must-Attend

Generative AI is revolutionizing the way businesses operate, offering new possibilities for innovation and efficiency. However, getting started with AI can often feel overwhelming, especially when it comes to setting up the necessary infrastructure and integrating AI capabilities into your existing workflows. That’s where the SAP BTP GenAI Starter Kit comes in—a powerful, yet user-friendly toolkit that simplifies the entire process, allowing you to focus on what matters most: building and deploying AI-driven applications that deliver real value.

What You’ll Learn

  1. Kickstart Your GenAI Projects: We’ll demonstrate how you can quickly set up and configure all the critical infrastructure components needed to start building GenAI-powered apps on SAP BTP. With the SAP BTP GenAI Starter Kit, you’ll see how easy it is to get up and running, even if you’re new to the platform.
  2. Simplifying SAP AI Core Service and SAP HANA Cloud Setup: Setting up AI infrastructure can be a daunting task, but it doesn’t have to be. We’ll guide you step-by-step through the process of setting up SAP AI Core Service and SAP HANA Cloud, breaking down complex configurations into simple, actionable steps that you can follow along in real time.
  3. Implementing Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Applications: Learn how to leverage SAP BTP to create Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) applications that enhance your AI capabilities. RAG is a cutting-edge approach that combines retrieval-based methods with generative AI, enabling more accurate and contextually relevant outputs. We’ll show you how to implement this powerful technique, tailored specifically to your use case.
  4. Enhancing AI Results for Your Use Case: Every business is unique, and so are the challenges it faces. We’ll explore techniques to fine-tune and optimize your AI applications to ensure they deliver results that are not only accurate but also highly relevant to your specific needs. From customizing data inputs to refining AI models, you’ll gain insights into making your AI applications truly your own.

Who Should Attend

This live stream is perfect for developers, IT professionals, AI enthusiasts, and business leaders who are eager to explore the potential of Generative AI within their organizations. Whether you’re looking to enhance your current applications or create entirely new AI-driven solutions, this session will equip you with the practical knowledge and tools to succeed.

Why You Shouldn't Miss This Opportunity

AI is transforming industries at an unprecedented pace, and the ability to harness its power can set your business apart from the competition. By joining this live stream, you’ll not only learn how to build GenAI-powered apps quickly and effectively, but you’ll also gain a deeper understanding of SAP BTP’s capabilities as a robust platform for innovation.

Don’t miss this chance to be part of the next wave of AI-driven business transformation. Whether you’re looking to improve customer experiences, streamline operations, or develop new products, this session will provide you with the insights and practical guidance you need to start building the future today.

When

September 17, 2024 at 15:00 CEST

Join the Live Session on YouTube

Add to calendar: https://url.sap/iw7xd1 

Get ready to accelerate your GenAI journey with SAP BTP. Discover the tools, techniques, and strategies that will empower you to create AI-powered apps in just minutes. See you at the live stream! 😊

entry.title: Re: How to update key field in RAP managed scenario?
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer 

is there a way to update those on create determination in managed scenario?

I have the userid as a key field, but I would like to set it from the backend and not to pass if from the UI.

Regards,

Georgi

entry.title: Re: Group Currency mismatches with local currency
entry.content: did you know the reason behind this issue?

entry.title: Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid isn't working with only one selected record?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid not working with only one selected record?
Is it should work like that.
ls_layout-sel_mode = 'A'.
And everything is good when it's more than one.

entry.title: Re: How to push down a filter using current date value to ABAP source
entry.content: Hi Matt, if you are still looking for a solution, I found one which i explain in my blog

entry.title: Re: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
Please use Mvt 343 to move from blocked to unrestricted.

Mvt 321 can only be applied when deciding on inspection lot.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: POD flow with movement 631
entry.content:
Hello Barath,

 

Thanks for your reply. Actually we opened an incident to SAP which states that 687+631 is not supported since the POD concept is to confirm the change of property which is not happening in the consignment process.

We'll go with a custom solution similar to yours. How did you set the stock in transit with the custom VLPOD? Where you able to update the document flow on the delivery? It is possible to put the stock in transit directly from MIGO?

Thanks

entry.title: Sales Invoices for Export sales with payment of IGST and without payment of IGST tax
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Kindly guide wherein the below case for export sale invoices there should be a checkbox or custom field for the application of IGST on the export sale invoice. That checkbox decides whether the IGST will be applied in the invoice or not.

In case of Export Sale Invoices do we have condition or tax code wherein IGST get posted and reversed to a different account simultaneously.

For Example,

With payment of IGST

Export Sale Invoice is $1000 and the IGST is $180,

In this case the total invoice pricing should include the IGST of $180 for which the journal entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1180

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

    To IGST-Output                Cr.             $180

Then, simultaneously another entry is posted in the background as below;

IGST-Output                           Dr.   $180

   To IGST Receivable             Cr.            $180

The said IGST receivable is then received as form of duty drawback months later when the payment is completed.

 

And the other condition being the exclusion of IGST totally, in which case the entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1000

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

 

If there is some solution or workaround to the above case any suggestion is greatly helpful.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh

entry.title: Custom Field on GST Statutory reports - India
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Can anyone guide me if we can add the invoice level custom fields on the GST Statutory Reports - India.

If it possible any configurations or activations are to be done do suggest.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh

entry.title: Re: Report on Content URL in LMS
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Use pre-defined Baiwang Golden Tax Integration Flows with S/4HANA on Premise (GTI)
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you received any response from SAP on your ticket. I saw a new updated link 

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPDocumentandReportingComplianceElectronicInvoicingforChina/overview

but still not clear how it will work with S/4HANA on prem with Ariba Network 

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: Transfer stock error
entry.content: No, the movement type is mandatory. A complete list of movement types you can find in SSCUI 103898. There is also a blog in the community in regards to movement types (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-good-movement-types-list-of-sap-movement-types/ba-p/13551698).

entry.title: Re: Use pre-defined Baiwang Golden Tax Integration Flows with S/4HANA on Premise (GTI)
entry.content: Yes, due to my incident the documentation was updated. But as mentioned in the documentation "This solution support both SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA On Premise versions.". So what exact integration do you look for Ariba?

entry.title: Re: Tracking Air Scenario in BN4L GTT
entry.content:
Hello,

With GTT yes you can Track and Trace with Air Mode, i.e the Master Airway Bill can be used for track you need check with the 3rd party content provider (coverage vary per visibility provider).
Regards

entry.title: Re: Overall status of sales order (IC -CTAD) showing irre...
entry.content: Sir, We have already assigned x to that perticular reason of rejection. screenshot has been attached for reference (Image 3).

entry.title: Is there a way to update "delivery block" for SO Item before the SO is saved?
entry.content:
Hi there,

We need to implement a block at the item level for a material before saving the Sales Order. Currently, there is no BADI available that allows us to modify the DELIVERY BLOCK field at the item level. Although we have the BADI "SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_BUSINESS," it does not include the DELIVERY BLOCK field in its changing parameters, making it unsuitable for adjusting the delivery status at the item level. Are there any extensibility options available that would allow us to update the DELIVERY BLOCK field? 

Thanks and Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to update "delivery block" for SO Item...
entry.content:
Hello,

(1) Based on the current product:

Currently there is no BAdI that supports automatically assigning a item-level delivery block before the sales order is saved.

Instead of BAdI, as a workaround, would you check if API - Sales Order (A2X) can fulfill your requirement, e.g., assigning a "DeliveryBlockReason" (on header level) when the sales order is created by this API?

See more details from the Help Portal Sales Order Header: DeliveryBlockReason: "Indicates if an entire sales order is blocked for delivery".

(2) Besides, you are also encouraged to submit a feature request through the Customer Influence Portal under the section SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales, e.g., requiring relevant configuration activities which can help you define default delivery block reason when sales order is created, etc.

KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product

Thank you!

entry.title: Security deposit refund process through FICO for fica customers
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone please help me on the Security deposit refund process through FICO for fica customers.

I got one requirement that once the security deposit is released in isu fica it needs to go to the fico and the refund will be need to do from the fico through F110.

Is this scenario is possible?
